description: The TextCountdownClock component is able to make a countdown till a certain value of T (world time) since a session started. This drives a text field to do so.

fields.CountdownTime: The world time we are counting down to (The world time is zero when a session starts)
fields.AllowNegative: Whether negative time can be displayed after the time for the world has been reached. Or to display 0 if false.
fields.TextTarget: Text String field to drive with the form of HH:MM:SS based on the value in ``CountdownTime``.

usage: This component creates a Text String in the form of HH:MM:SS as a countdown timer based on the difference in the value of T (world time) and the value of CountdownTime.
